subcodes.first_line: O Ghulám-Riḍá! Mighty indeed is this Cause, and momentous this Day! Blessed are they who, with supreme steadfastness, have stood firm in this Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام رضا امر عظمیست و یوم عظیم طوبی از برای نفوسیکه باستقامت کبری بر امر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
